# HPD.ML.BinaryClassification.CalibratorTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-BinaryClassification` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.BinaryClassification`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.BinaryClassification`
- Kind: `class`

Platt scaling: learns sigmoid parameters A, B to map raw scores to calibrated probabilities. P(y=1|score) = 1 / (1 + exp(A*score + B)) Used by SVM and Perceptron which don't produce calibrated outputs natively.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class CalibratorTransform : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```
